solutions.solution: From all the three positions of the dice, adjacent faces of 4 = 1, 2, 3 and 5. It is clear that, the digit opposite to 4 = 6
From positions I and II, common dots = 2 and 4 (at the common right face). So, the face opposite to face having 3 dots will be the face having 6 dots.
From positions II and III, Common letters = d and e. Clearly, f is opposite to a
Dice can be shown as [diagram showing unfolded dice with B at top, D-C-A in middle row, E below, and ? at bottom]. So, from the unfolded dice, it is clear that the letter opposite to D is A.
